description: Mehr News Agency is an Iranian news agency affiliated with the Islamic Ideology Dissemination Organization (Sazman-e Tablighat-e Eslami), a body under the [Office of the Supreme Leader](/orgs/office-of-the-supreme-leader). Founded in 2003, Mehr produces multilingual content in English, Arabic, Turkish, and other languages. It occupies a conservative to hardliner position in the Iranian media spectrum, promoting the regime's cultural and ideological messaging.
editorial_notes: Affiliated with the Islamic Ideology Dissemination Organization (IIDO/Sazman-e Tablighat-e Eslami).
